meaning: n.[化]抗氧化剂,硬化防止剂
examples: The antioxidant nutrients found in papaya have also been proven to reduce muscle inflammation and heal burns and wounds.
It is good to consume tomatoes as they have lycopene, which is an antioxidant and hence works as a sunscreen from within.
We need to evaluate its antioxidant capacity by TLC-bioautography.
Their own product literature makes only vague and unactionable statements about xanthones having antioxidant properties.
The same goes for FRS Healthy Energy, the antioxidant drink pitched by Lance Armstrong.
